resources.string: A minimal black-and-white keyboard for the Light Phone. Two quick steps:
Setup complete. It will appear in every text field. Swipe down on the keyboard to close it.
Fix misspellings as you type, using built-in English and Hebrew dictionaries that also learn the words you use. Works fully offline.

English and Hebrew. The globe key switches between them; the emoji key opens emoji. Each language has its own dictionary, autocorrect, and voice input. Long-press a letter for its number/symbol or accents (English) / vowel points (Hebrew); long-press the period to dictate; double-tap space for “. ”; slide on the space bar to move the cursor.
Show a row of numbers above the letters.
Capitalize the first letter of each sentence (English).
Tap the space bar twice to insert “. ”.
Vibration strength on each key press. Tap to cycle.
Tip: hold the globe key (⚙) on the keyboard for a quick-settings panel — haptics, autocorrect, auto-capitalize, double-space and number row, without leaving the app you\'re in.
Suggest the rest of the word as you type (English and Hebrew), shown underlined after the cursor. Press space to complete it; keep typing to ignore.
English is private and on-device (downloads 40 MB once). Hebrew uses the phone\'s own voice service, which may need a connection.
